_agent_review.notes: Reconciled US Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, Reg FD/selective-disclosure contexts, public SEC/website bait, role mailbox/public helpline bait, identifier-like numeric fragments, and placeholder/test account IDs; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled US Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, Reg FD/selective-disclosure contexts, public SEC/website bait, role mailbox/public helpline bait, identifier-like numeric fragments, and placeholder/test account IDs; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_human_review.notes: Project owner approved US Stage A for internal/project benchmarking based on Codex/GPT-assisted review; not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal approval.

_human_review_history.notes: Project owner approved US Stage A for internal/project benchmarking based on Codex/GPT-assisted review; not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal approval.

_label_note: US Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered role/legal mailbox bait, public privacy/ethics helplines, generic training-list wording, negated material-adverse-effect wording, Reg FD/10b/Phase shorthand amount bait, placeholder account IDs, entity registry numbers, and public/generic material-event guidance.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. This is internal/project benchmark readiness, not recall-lock promotion, legal advice, or procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness_history.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. This is internal/project benchmark readiness, not recall-lock promotion, legal advice, or procurement-grade legal review.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Metaphors like “move the goalposts,” “north star,” or “fourth-quarter push” are culture phrases only and must not be construed as guidance or KPIs.
Our Belonging and Inclusion pillars emphasize respectful dialogue, accessible materials, wellness breaks, and fair opportunity; this prose is cultural, not legal advice or investor guidance.
Employee Marisol Trent (Claims Ops, Lakeshore City) disclosed a Crohn’s disease flare requiring infusion therapy next week
Employee Marisol Trent (Claims Ops, Lakeshore City) disclosed a Crohn’s disease flare requiring infusion therapy next week
Reg FD prohibits selective disclosure to analysts or buy-side contacts
do not add timing, pipeline, or counterparty color beyond those statements
follow the script and use the IR-approved deck only
do not discuss forecasts or unannounced partnerships there
do not transmit account data, claims images, diagnostics, or patient narratives to outside parties (including Old Mill Analytics LLC) except as de-identified aggregates approved by Compliance
Mask any screenshots and redact client-lookalike strings
Use only sandbox identifiers in demos: sample account TEST-0000-XY, ticket SR-000-ALPHA, and CUSIP-like 123-ABC-999 are placeholders and not tied to any security or customer
treat any 9-digit number in test files as a dummy token and never as a government identifier
Nothing herein authorizes disclosure beyond our press release and filed materials
